caption: Had to replace the exit sign ballast over the west door at Bethlehem today. Third time that thing's gone out this year.
Dad just tell the council to replace the whole fixture already
Already on the fall calendar. Some things you patch til the budget's ready.
Are you coming out for the 4th? Nate keeps asking about you.
Plan on it. Drive up Saturday morning, be there before noon.
Roger's doing brisket. Emma wants sparklers so we're heading to the park after dark.
Tell Nate I'll bring the good ones. Can't find 'em in town anymore but Dale knows a guy.
😂 Of course Dale knows a guy. Drive safe ok?

Kessler's rush hour, Saturday morning. Even the parking lot has a line. #1
First frost on the tomato vines. Time to pull them up. #1
Nate at the robotics tournament. Second place in the district. #1
Emma's birthday cake. Karen made it look easy. #1
Church van new tires. Bohl's Auto did a fine job. #1
Coffee with Dale. Same corner booth as always. #1
New LED panels going up in the sanctuary. Big upgrade. #1
Marlene's roses coming in this year. She'd be pleased. #1
Boiler inspection passed. Klein's tech was thorough. #1
Wednesday supper turnout. 82 plates served, good night. #1
Christmas Eve luminaria along the walk. Barb hung the lights. #1
Fellowship hall floor waxed twice. Shining like new. #1
First snow of the season. Silverado handling fine. #1
Karen dropped off a casserole. Green bean this time. #1
Elaine's dog Buster on my porch again. He knows where the treats are. #1
Dale's grandson's high school graduation photo. Time flies. #1
Church parking lot re-striped. Sharp new lines. #1
Advent wreath candles lit for the first Sunday. #1
Aberdeen Central alumni polo. Still fits after all these years. #1
Sunday sermon Vimeo link forwarded to Mavis and Harold. #1
Runnings had the snow shovels on sale. Bought two. #1
Kitchen dishwasher gasket replaced. Fellowship hall dry again. #1
Nate's report card. Three A's and a B. Proud grandpa. #1
Tyler's basketball photo Jeff sent. Getting tall. #1
New sound board fuse holder installed. Right channel clean. #1
Church van tires rotated. Bohl's Auto Tuesday morning. #1
Basement classroom refresh, week 2. Baseboards next. #1
Dale brought a thermos of coffee to Koffee Kup. Nice gesture. #1
Furnace filter change day. Merv 11, 20x25x1. #1
Elaine's casserole tin returned with cookies inside. #1
